title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Power Grid Corporation

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Power Grid Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Power Grid Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Power Grid Corporation:
Power Grid Corporation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation!
